debug_components.name: ConnectionDebugPanel
debug_components.purpose: Shows connection status, credentials, and debug logs in DM Dashboard
debug_components.current_status: BROKEN - checks for VITE_SUPABASE_* which don't exist
debug_components.additional_notes: Panel spans ~270 lines; includes credential display, event logging, copy-to-clipboard functionality

debug_components.name: AuthDebugOverlay
debug_components.purpose: Floating auth debug panel with console log capture and credential status
debug_components.current_status: BROKEN - checks for VITE_SUPABASE_* which don't exist
debug_components.where_used: Appears to be loaded in App.tsx or triggered conditionally
debug_components.additional_notes: Floating button UI (🔍) that opens debug overlay; captures console logs in real-time

debug_components.name: OAuthDebugConsole
debug_components.purpose: OAuth diagnostics, session monitoring, and character recovery
debug_components.current_status: TRANSITIONAL - imports supabase but doesn't check credentials
debug_components.where_used: Likely in App.tsx or conditionally triggered
debug_components.should_check: N/A (different pattern - uses imports not env vars)
debug_components.additional_notes: Does NOT display credentials; focuses on OAuth diagnostics and session state. May need refactoring to use Firebase auth instead of Supabase

risk_assessment.reasoning: Two UI debug panels currently display incorrect credential status (always showing ❌ NOT CONFIGURED even with working Firebase). This will confuse developers during troubleshooting and deployment verification. Active code is blocked; documentation and scripts are secondary.
risk_assessment.developer_impact: HIGH - when troubleshooting connection issues, developers see red ❌ flags even though Firebase is correctly configured
risk_assessment.production_impact: LOW - these are debug panels; not user-facing. Only affects internal diagnostics

priority_1_critical_components.action: Replace VITE_SUPABASE_* checks with VITE_FIREBASE_* checks
priority_1_critical_components.scope_notes: Check all credential display logic; update diagnostic messages to reference Firebase instead of Supabase
